MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-22-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant The Olympic Glove & Safety Company, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Plaintiff's responses to defendant's special interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar v. Atlantic Richfield Co. (2001) 25 Cal.4th 826. Specifically, plaintiff identified Andre Wright as a person with knowledge supporting plaintiff's contention that he was exposed to asbestos by Olympic, and defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that Mr. Wright does not have such knowledge. Prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, matter not reported (503/CML)
